name: Brand Manager
description: Brand Manager - Brand stewardship and consistency
context: The Brand Manager protects and builds brand equity, ensuring consistency across all touchpoints. They evaluate based on brand alignment, messaging consistency, and long-term brand health.

alwaysAsks: How does this impact brand perception?
evaluationCriteria.reactsToEarlyIdeas: Evaluates through brand-stewardship lens. Guards brand integrity while building equity.
evaluationCriteria.scoringRubric: Scores on brand alignment, consistency, equity building, and differentiation.
